vibe: Cinematic, moody, expensive feel. Data-driven but visually bold. Y2K elements for case study.

headings.style: uppercase, tracking-tighter for large text, font-black or font-bold

mono.usage: Data points, stats, metrics, labels, uppercase small tracking-widest.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-12 to p-32 for sections). Asymmetrical layouts. Never default to simple centered grids.
layout_and_spacing.matrix_grid: The 'Control Room' Bento Grid. Grid-cols-4 for desktop, Grid-cols-2 tablet, Grid-cols-1 mobile. Dense gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Technical borders.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/10). Sticky.
surface_strategies.cards: Grid Borders ('Technical' Look) - border-border, bg-surface, sharp corners or very subtle rounding (rounded-sm), no shadow or subtle neon glow on hover.
surface_strategies.hero_overlay: Gradient overlay if over image, max bg-black/50.

motion_and_interactions.3d_hero: React Three Fiber (@react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei). Render an abstract floating metallic mesh or geometric object that reacts to mouse/scroll.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: react-fast-marquee for editorial ribbon separating sections (e.g., 'CREATIVE STRATEGY • FUNNEL OPTIMIZATION').
motion_and_interactions.framer_motion: Fade up text reveals, stagger children in lists, animated numbers for stats.

joao_portrait.description: Artistic dark portrait of a man, used in the About / Philosophy section.

baby_phat_case_study.description: Y2K denim streetwear model, used as the anchor image for the Baby Phat Case Study.

abstract_background.description: Dark metallic 3D render, can be used as a texture or fallback for the hero/services section.

component_instructions.hero: min-h-screen. Absolute inset-0 for R3F Canvas. Pointer events none for canvas wrapper. Big H1 'JOÃO VICTOR TAVARES' and subtitle 'Creative Marketing Strategist'.
component_instructions.about: Asymmetric layout. Text block on one side, joao_portrait on the other. Include email (victormirmav00@gmail.com).
component_instructions.case_study: Baby Phat: Rebuilding the Creative Engine. Anchor piece. Include baby_phat_case_study image. Highlight metrics using Framer Motion animated counters. ROAS 1.82x->3.47x (+90.6%), CAC -47.5%, Hook Rate +88.5%, Hold Rate +132%, Thumb-stop CTR +157%, Revenue $728K->1.39M. Detail 'kill discipline' and 'testing roadmap'.
component_instructions.hook_matrix: Visualized 4x3 Hook-Cluster Matrix. 4 clusters (A/B/C/D) x 3 stages (TOFU/MOFU/BOFU). Use a dense bento grid with technical borders.
component_instructions.services: List out: Creative Strategy, Hook Frameworks, Performance Creative, Funnel Optimization. Use large typography.
component_instructions.contact: Contact form (Name, Email, Message) using Shadcn primitives heavily customized (dark borders, transparent backgrounds). Include LinkedIn link (https://www.linkedin.com/in/joao-victor-t-4a2b6085/).
component_instructions.testing: MUST include data-testid attributes for interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').
